name: vocab-master
description: 高效英语背单词桌面软件 - 采用SM-2间隔重复算法，科学记忆英语词汇

scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s tests && node tests/core-utils.test.js && node tests/learning-intelligence.test.js
scripts.check: python -m py_compile app.py build_wordbanks.py generate_icon.py setup_shortcuts.py run.pyw && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/core-utils.js && node --check src/learning-intelligence.js
